  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Does 'Clean this up' mean (A) only sentence-level grammar and flow improvements, or (B) also larger structural changes like reordering paragraphs for a better narrative?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The delegation 'Clean this up' is a direct and load-bearing request for sentence- and paragraph-level improvements to grammar, flow, and conciseness.",
    "RX.1": "As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will ensure any claims are appropriately qualified and uncertainties are disclosed.",
    "RX.2": "As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will check for and flag potential overclaiming of the work's contributions or novelty.",
    "RX.3": "As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will ensure the writing remains focused on the defined scope of the research.",
    "RX.4": "As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will remain vigilant for any content that could inadvertently encourage harmful applications.",
    "RX.5": "As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will ensure that all claims are clearly attributable to their sources, whether internal logic or external citations."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'Clean this up' mean (A) only sentence-level grammar and flow improvements, or (B) also larger structural changes like reordering paragraphs for a better narrative?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' is a direct and load-bearing request for sentence- and paragraph-level improvements to grammar, flow, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will ensure any claims are appropriately qualified and uncertainties are disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will check for and flag potential overclaiming of the work's contributions or novelty.
rationale.RX.3: As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will ensure the writing remains focused on the defined scope of the research.
rationale.RX.4: As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will remain vigilant for any content that could inadvertently encourage harmful applications.
rationale.RX.5: As a cross-cutting responsibility, the agent will ensure that all claims are clearly attributable to their sources, whether internal logic or external citations.
